phases.name: Base
phases.text: Pick the base before spending anything: right class/tags for the wanted mods, best item level available (ilvl caps tiers — the digest pool is exact), fixable sockets. Vendor recipes that PRODUCE a base (+1 gems weapon, % phys weapon) happen now, because they require or reset rarity.

phases.name: Quality
phases.text: Quality while the item is NORMAL: +5% per Whetstone/Scrap/Bauble against +2% on magic and +1% on rare. Quality also improves Jeweller's and Fusing outcomes, so it always precedes socket work.

phases.name: Sockets
phases.text: Socket count, then links, then colors — changing the count disturbs links and colors, and Fusings reroll links (colors survive). While leveling, the bench's fixed prices beat orb-spamming.

phases.name: Mods
phases.text: Magic route: Transmute, Alterations until the key mod, Augmentation. Rare route: essence (guaranteed mod, full reroll) or Alchemy. Every full reroll erases bench crafts — finish rerolling before benching.

phases.name: Upgrade or reset
phases.text: Regal keeps both magic mods and adds one — only regal a good blue with an open-affix plan for the bench. Scouring wipes everything except fractured mods.

phases.name: Bench
phases.text: Bench-craft the missing affix LAST, into a confirmed open slot of the right generation. Crafting again replaces the bench mod; any reroll deletes it.

phases.name: Corrupt
phases.text: Vaal Orb is final — a corrupted item can never be modified again. While leveling: just don't.

rules: Vendor recipes check rarity: the +1 gems recipe needs a NORMAL weapon — transmuting first ruins the recipe; the Rustic Sash recipe overwrites existing mods (result is always magic).
Fractured and corrupted items cannot be vendor-recipe ingredients; corrupted items cannot be crafted on at all.
Quality before Jeweller's and Fusings: item quality improves both socket-count and link outcomes, and quality is 5x cheaper to apply on normal items.
Socket count before links, links before colors: changing the count disturbs links and colors; Fusings reroll links but keep colors.
Essences, Chaos, Alterations and Scours are full rerolls: they delete bench-crafted mods. Bench only after the last reroll.
Regal preserves existing mods (magic to rare, adds one); Scouring preserves only fractured mods.
Never bench without a confirmed open affix of the right generation — the digest counts them.
A Vaal Orb, if used at all, is the last step of any plan.
